description: Run a command with a time limit — cross-platform timeout(1).

platform.value_on_windows: Windows timeout.exe only SLEEPS — it does not bound a command; runfor actually enforces a deadline
platform.value_on_unix: Same role as coreutils timeout, with a consistent --json envelope and exit-code family across platforms

prefer_default_when: You only need to sleep for a fixed duration (use timeout.exe or sleep instead — runfor launches a command)
You are on Unix and the command respects SIGTERM reliably and you have no need for --json or a consistent exit-code family

options.description: Structured JSON metadata for AI agents
Signal sent at the deadline on Unix: TERM (default), HUP, INT, QUIT, KILL. Ignored on Windows.
Unix: after the deadline signal, wait GRACE then SIGKILL the tree. No-op on Windows (kills immediately).
Coloured output: auto (default when omitted), always, or never

exit_codes.description: Child exited 0 before the deadline (or forwarded child code 1–123)
Deadline exceeded — the child was terminated
Usage error: missing/invalid DURATION, no command, bad --signal/--kill-after

io.stdout: Child process stdout passes through unmodified
io.stderr: Child stderr passes through; runfor's own notice and --json summary also go here

examples.description: Cap a test run at 5 minutes
SIGTERM at 10s, SIGKILL 3s later if it ignores it (Unix)
Send SIGINT instead of SIGTERM at the deadline (Unix)

json_output_fields.name: exit_code
json_output_fields.description: runfor's exit code (child's on completion, 124 timeout, 130 interrupt, 126/127 launch)

json_output_fields.name: child_exit_code
json_output_fields.description: Child's exit code if it completed, else null

json_output_fields.name: signal
json_output_fields.description: Signal name configured for the deadline (Unix)

json_output_fields.name: kill_failed
json_output_fields.description: True iff a kill was attempted and could not be confirmed

json_output_fields.name: duration_ms
json_output_fields.description: Wall-clock time from launch to resolution, milliseconds
